team.name: Claude Code
team.roleDesc: Primary engineer for high-precision code generation, algorithmic optimization, and complex feature implementation.

team.name: Gemini
team.roleDesc: Master of massive context windows and cross-project knowledge synthesis. Manages secrets, vaults, and platform stability.

team.name: Codex
team.roleDesc: Ensures delivery velocity through automated testing, API prototyping, and CI/CD maintenance. Validates all fleet output.

team.name: Misty
team.roleDesc: European model advantage. Handles AI Act compliance, audit logging, multi-agent transparency, and DACH enterprise requirements.

team.name: OpenClaw
team.roleDesc: Runs the physical robot arm (Huenit), painting pipeline, and Telegram gateway on the Mac Mini. Master control for the Robot Ross skill.

projects.title: Robot Ross
projects.summary: Physical robot arm (Huenit) controlled by Claude Code / OpenClaw on the Mac Mini. Paints on canvas from AI-generated prompts. Includes Telegram gateway for remote command and photo inbound.

projects.title: Music Video Tool
projects.summary: Automated pipeline for generating music videos and social content. Python/FFmpeg stack with AI image generation, audio sync, and upload automation.

projects.title: Agentic CRM Prototype
projects.summary: Our North Star demo: a high-fidelity React/FastAPI CRM managed autonomously by the fleet. Demonstrates cross-platform coordination, Google Calendar integration, and lead pipeline automation.

projects.title: The Lost Coins
projects.summary: Narrative/story-driven project. Chapter-based storytelling with AI-generated visuals and audio, managed through the fleet pipeline.

projects.title: Salesman (OpenClaw Gateway)
projects.summary: Public OpenClaw gateway and BobRossSkill on DigitalOcean. Handles inbound skill requests, OAuth, and routes to the Mac Mini robot control system.

projects.title: Agentic Fleet Hub (Flotilla)
projects.summary: The fleet's own infrastructure: PocketBase, dispatcher, heartbeat protocol, Telegram bridge, and Fleet Hub dashboard. The always-on multi-agent coordination layer.
